prompt.en: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body clean anime-style character illustration of Yue Chenli, a 41-year-old foundation sealing inspector from a modern city subsidence bureau. He is an even larger, thicker, more muscular adult male than the reference: huge sturdy build, extremely broad shoulders, massive heavy chest, very large upper arms and forearms, thick back, powerful thighs, warm deep wheat skin, a heavy square face, narrow deep rock-gray eyes, a calm stern expression, a short scar beside the bridge of his nose, very short black buzz-cut hair, and short stiff stubble. Outfit focus: NO OUTERWEAR at all, the jacket is completely removed. His upper body wears only a very tight clean white short-sleeve T-shirt tucked into high-waist work trousers. The white T-shirt must cling tightly to his chest, shoulders, upper arms, and torso; the sleeves are visibly stretched by his deltoids and biceps, emphasizing extreme muscular bulk without being glossy or wet. Lower body: high-waist heavy rock-blue-gray inspection work trousers with wide straight legs, reinforced knee-side pockets and a short stake sleeve; heavy black-charcoal anti-slip work boots; thick half-finger work gloves on both hands; a short cord necklace with an old steel foundation-stake tag; a wide tool belt carrying a pressure hammer and folding ruler. Props: a short-handled pressure hammer and a foundation-stake measuring ruler, clearly readable as city foundation inspection tools. Fantasy anchor: only a few restrained orange-yellow low-glow calibration marks on the stake tag, belt ruler, and tool edges, compact and tidy, not a strong aura. Material language: clean anime color blocks, simple cel-shaded folds, simplified old steel accents; no photoreal fabric grain, no glossy leather, no wet material, no fashion-photo rendering. Style: clean anime game character concept art, crisp outline, simple cel shading, strong readable silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to boots, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no jacket, no coat, no vest, no outerwear on upper body, no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere on the character.
prompt.cn: 只画一个人物：岳沉砺，41岁男性，地基封桩监察员。巨型厚实体格，极宽肩、厚胸、粗壮大臂和前臂，深暖麦色皮肤，宽厚方脸，深岩灰狭长眼，鼻梁侧短疤，黑色寸头，短硬胡茬。服装重点：完全不穿外套，外套已经脱掉；上半身只穿非常紧的白色短袖T恤，T恤贴住胸肌、肩膀和大臂，袖口被三角肌和肱二头肌撑紧，下摆扎进高腰岩蓝灰重型工装裤。下装为高腰宽腿监察工装裤，膝侧加固袋和短桩套，黑炭重型防滑靴，双手半指厚工装手套，短绳旧钢封桩牌，宽工具腰带挂测压锤和折叠标尺。手持短柄测压锤和封桩刻度尺。幻想锚点只在封桩牌、腰带刻度和工具边缘有少量橙黄低光，不能强发光。材质为干净动画色块、概括褶皱、简化金属点缀，不要写实布料纹理、油亮皮革、湿身材质或摄影质感。干净动画游戏立绘，清晰线条，简单赛璐璐上色，单人全身，从头到脚完整可见，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕，不能有渐变、纹理、地面、影子、文字或其他角色。

forbidden: profile attributes appended directly to image prompt
generation notes appended directly to image prompt

chromaKey.name: green
chromaKey.reason: The final image prompt explicitly specifies this chroma-key color, so it overrides automatic color inference.
